mano_cua.result_summary: emoji轮播组件在slidesToShow大于实际幻灯片数时出现多余空白克隆幻灯片。观察到emoji carousel显示5个位置（左右各一个空白深色方块+中间3个emoji），而实际应只显示实际存在的幻灯片内容。空白方块在动画过程中反复出现，确认为slidesToShow > 实际slide数量时生成了多余重复克隆。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Emoji carousel clearly shows the bug: 5 visible positions (empty dark box on LEFT, 3 emojis in middle, empty dark box on RIGHT) when it should only show actual slides. The empty boxes on both sides are extra cloned/blank slides generated when slidesToShow exceeds actual slide count. Main carousel text transitions also show partial overlap of adjacent slide content during animation.
